hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "[CEO-GUARD] Lysander CEO 执行禁区已激活。任何 Bash/Edit/Write 工具调用必须通过 Agent/Skill 工具派单给团队成员执行。Lysander 主对话中直接调用 Bash/Edit/Write 将被视为违规。"}}'

PROJECT_DIR="/c/Users/lysanderl_janusd/Claude Code/ai-team-system"; LOG_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/logs"; mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"; INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); SESSION=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); case "$TOOL" in Bash) CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null | head -c 200); SUMMARY="$CMD" ;; Edit) FP=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); SUMMARY="Edit: $FP" ;; Write) FP=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); SUMMARY="Write: $FP" ;; *) SUMMARY="$TOOL" ;; esac; echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] PRE session=$SESSION tool=$TOOL summary=\"$SUMMARY\"" >> "$LOG_DIR/ceo-guard-audit.log"; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "[CEO-GUARD-REMINDER] 你正在调用执行工具。如果你是 Lysander CEO 主对话，请确认：1) 已输出团队派单表 2) 当前操作标注了执行者身份（如 harness_engineer 执行）。如果你是子 Agent 团队成员，请忽略此提醒。"}}'

PROJECT_DIR="/c/Users/lysanderl_janusd/Claude Code/ai-team-system"; LOG_DIR="$PROJECT_DIR/logs"; mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR"; INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_name // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); SESSION=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.session_id // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] POST session=$SESSION tool=$TOOL" >> "$LOG_DIR/ceo-guard-audit.log"; echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'
